title: Louvain-la-Neuve, Walloon Brabant — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Louvain-la-Neuve, Walloon Brabant: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Louvain-la-Neuve is a city in Walloon Brabant with a population of 30,000. A purpose-built university town created in the 1970s, home to the French-speaking Catholic University of Louvain with a lively student atmosphere.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
